verses.text: Kumpi Hezekiah in a zak ciangin dahin ama puante balkek a, Topa' innsungah a pai hi
Tua ciangin amah in innsung saipa Eliakim, lai-atpa Shebna, leh siampi khangham teng dahna limin puanhampi silh kawmin Amoz' tapa kamsangpa Isaiah kiangah a sawl hi
Amaute in Isaiah kiangah, “Hezekiah in, ‘Tuni pen lungkham ni, tai ngah ni, mindai ni ahi hi. Naungek a suah hun tung napi-in a hingkhia zolo nupi tawh i kibang hi

A nungta Pasian a zahko dingin ama topa, Assiria kumpipa in a sawl a ulianpa' thugente, Topa na Pasian in za hen la, tua bang thu a gente gim pia ta hen. Tua ahih ciangin a omlai i mite-a' dingin thu ngen in,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi
Kumpi Hezekiah' nasemte Isaiah kiangah a tun' uh ciangin
Isaiah in amaute tungah, “Na topa uh kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Assiria kumpipa' nasemte in keimah a hong simmawhna na zaksa uh thute hangin lau kei un
En un, amah in kam lengsawn khat za-in ama gamah a ciahkikna ding lungsim ka guan' ding a, ama gamsungah namsau tawh amah ka tuksak ding hi,’ ci-in gen un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a ulianpa ciahkik a, Assiria kumpipa in Libnah khua a simna-ah a va pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa in Lakhish khua a nusiat khitna thu zazo ahih manin tua lai a va zuanpah ahi hi

Tu-in, Ethiopia kumpi Tirhakah in Assiria gam a sim dingin Egypt galkap honpi tawh a hong kuanna thu Assiria mite in a za uh hi. Hih thu a zak ciangin Assiria kumpipa in Hezekiah kiangah kamtaite sawl a
“Judah kumpi Hezekiah kiangah hih bangin gen un: ‘Assiria kumpipa' khutsungah Jerusalem kipialo ding hi, ci-a thu hong ciam na suan' Pasian' khemsa-in om kei in
En in, Assiria kumpite in gam khempeuhah a bawlna, a suksiatmang khitna na zazo hi. Nang hong kisuaktasak tuan ding ahi hiam
Ka pu ka pate un a suksiat minamte, Gozan minam, Haran minam, Rezef minamte, leh Telassar khua-a om Eden mite pen amau' pasian-te in honkhiazo ahi hiam
Hamath kumpipa, Arpad kumpipa, Sefarvaim khuapi kumpipa, Hena kumpipa ahih kei leh Ivvah kumpipate koi-ah om ahi hiam?’ va ci un,” ci-in a gen hi
Hezekiah in kamtaite tung panin a lai puak uh sangin, a lai a sim hi. Topa' inn-ah Hezekiah paito-in, Topa' mai-ah a lai a zal hi
Hezekiah in Topa' tungah thu ngenin
“Vanglian Topa, Israel-te' Pasian, Kherub-te tunga a tupa aw, nangmah bek, leitung kumpi gam khempeuhte' Pasian na hi hi. Nangmah in vantung leh leitung na bawl khin hi
Topa aw, na bil hong ngat in la hong za in. Topa aw, na mit hak in la hong mu in. Sennakherib in a nungta Pasian a zahkona, hong khak hih thute khempeuh za in
Topa aw, Assiria kumpite in mi khempeuh leh a gam khempeuh susiamang khin taktak a
amaute' pasian-te pen meikhuk sungah paihsak khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pen pasian hiloin mite' khut tawh a kibawl sing leh suangte ahi uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tuate kisusia hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa kote' Pasian aw, nang bek Topa na hihna thu leitung kumpi gam khempeuh in a theihna dingin, tu-in ama khutsung panin kote hong honkhia in,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin Amoz' tapa Isaiah in Hezekiah tungah thu puak a, “Israel-te' Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Nang in Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib tawh kisai thu, kei kiangah thu hong ngen khin na hih ciangin
amah tawh kisai-in Topa' thugen hih bang ahi hi: ‘Sennakherib aw, Jerusalem mite in nang hong simmawhin hong zahko uh hi. Jerusalem mite in na nungah a lu hong peisan lel uh hi
Nang in kua zahko-in kua a simmawh na hi hiam? Nang in kua' tungah na aw sangsakin kiphasak na hi hiam? Israel-te' Siangtho Pa, kei' tungah a hong tuaci na hi hi

Nangmah in na nasempa zangin Topa na zahko a, Lebanon mual dong pek, mual sangte tungah ka leeng tampite tawh ka pai khin hi. Taamtak sing a sangpente, taksing hoihpente ka phuk khin hi. A sangpen mun, tulak a thukpenna munah ka pai khin hi
Tuikhuk to-in tui ka dawn a, Egypt luituite khempeuh ka galkapte' khenuai tawh ka keusak hi, na ci hi

“ ‘Sawt peka kipan ka ngaihsutsa ahih lamtak za ngei nailo na hi hiam? Nang in khuapi muan'huaite susia gawpin ninbulomtang na suahsakna ding, a sunga teng mite a thahatna uh bei-in, lungkia-in a ommawkna ding, amaute pen lolai-a om kungnote leh lopa ngekte, innkhum zangah a po, a khan'khit ma-in a keutum lopate tawh a kibatna ding, tu-in ka tun'sak ding thute pen tanglai pek panin ka ngaihsutsa thu ahi hi
“ ‘Na omna mun, na vaksuk na vaktohna leh keima tungah na hehna ka thei hi

Keima tungah nang hehin, na kiphatsakna thu keima tungah a thu hong tung ahih manin, na nakah sikkawi bulhin, na kamah kamkaih hong bulhin, nong kuanna lampi lam mahah nang kong ciahkiksak ding hi,’ ci hi

“Nang Hezekiah-a' dingin hih in lim hong hi ding hi: Tu kumin anli pote na ne ding uh a, a kum nihna ciangin tua bangmahin a pote na ne leuleu ding uh hi. A kum thumna ciangin khai tuhin an na la ding uh a, leenggui suanin a gah na ne ding uh hi
Tua ciangin, Judah minam sung panin a suaktalai mite in singkung bangin zung khasuk kikin, gah na gahto kik ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a omlaite, Jerusalem pan ahi zongin a suakta teng, Zion Mual panin ahi zongin paikhia ding uh hi. Vanglian Topa' deihluatna in hih thu hong tungsak ding hi

“Tua ahih ciangin Assiria kumpipa tawh kisai-in Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Hih khuapi sungah amah hong pailo ding a, thaltang zong lawnlo ding hi. Lum tawh hong pailo ding a, galsimna ding pan'mun zong hong bawllo ding hi
Hong kuanna lampi mahah amah ciahkik ding a, hih khuapi sungah hong pailo ding hi, Topa in ci hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah leh ka nasempa David ka khualna-in hih khuapi a suahtakna dingin ka hu ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa' vantung mi kuankhia-in Assiria mite' giahphualah mihing tul za leh tul sawmgiat leh tul nga a that hi. Zingsangin mite a thawh ciangin hihte khempeuh misi luang bekbek na hi hi
Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib taikhia a, a inn-ah ciahin Nineveh khua-ah a teng hi
Amah in ama pasian Nisrok inn-ah bia-in a om laitakin, ama tate Adrammelek leh Sharezer in namsau tawh amah that uh a, Ararat gamah a tai uh hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Esarhaddon in ama tangin a uk hi.
